claimText: The Global Assessment Report (GAR) titled 'Resilience Pays' is released by the United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction (UNDRR).
evidenceExcerpt: UNDRR released the Global Assessment Report (GAR) titled Resilience Pays.
examUse: Statement-based question on reports and their publishing agencies.

claimText: The 15th Finance Commission recommended the creation of the National Disaster Mitigation Fund (NDMF) and State Disaster Mitigation Fund (SDMF).
evidenceExcerpt: 15th Finance Commission recommended the creation of National and State Disaster Mitigation Funds (NDMF and SDMF).
examUse: Statement-based question on Finance Commission recommendations regarding disaster management.

claimText: The Central Government contributes 75% to the State Disaster Mitigation Fund (SDMF) for general category states and 90% for North-Eastern and Himalayan states.
evidenceExcerpt: Centre contributes 75% to SDMF for general states and 90% for North-Eastern/Himalayan states.
examUse: Statement-based question on Centre-State funding patterns for disaster mitigation.

claimText: The Sendai Framework for Disaster Risk Reduction (2015-2030) is the successor to the Hyogo Framework for Action.
evidenceExcerpt: Sendai Framework for DRR (2015-30) is the successor to the Hyogo Framework for Action.
examUse: Correct-pair or chronological arrangement of international disaster management frameworks.

claimText: The UNDRR is headquartered in Geneva and is the lead UN agency for coordinating disaster risk reduction and achieving the Sendai Framework goals.
evidenceExcerpt: UNDRR, headquartered in Geneva, is the lead UN agency for coordinating DRR and achieving Sendai Framework goals.
examUse: Statement-based question on UN agencies, their headquarters, and mandates.
distractorHooks: United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) is the lead agency
